steps.title: Warm-up: Think in Hindi
steps.description: Think of 3 things you wanted to do yesterday but couldn't. Say them aloud in Hindi first, then convert to English using 'wanted to'.

steps.title: Read Today's Lesson
steps.description: Read all 8 sections of the 'Use of Wanted' lesson — pay special attention to the formula, negative form, and question form.

steps.title: Vocabulary Practice
steps.description: Read through 20 vocabulary words from today's list. Say each word aloud, check its pronunciation (IPA), and make one sentence with it.

steps.title: Practice Questions
steps.description: Attempt at least 30 practice questions from the list. Focus on translating Hindi sentences with 'चाहता था / चाहती थी / चाहते थे' correctly.

steps.title: Speaking Drill
steps.description: Pick any 3 speaking drill sets and repeat each sentence aloud 3 times. Focus on pronouncing 'wanted to' naturally and quickly.
